# Project PRD (llms.txt)

> Functional context for AI agents: the "what" and "why". Loaded early in the AGENTS.md
> cascade, before behavioral rules. Keep it factual and current.

- TODO: secondary goals, if any.

- TODO: external systems this project integrates with.

- Frontend: TODO

- **In scope:** TODO: what this project is responsible for.
- **Out of scope / non-goals:** TODO: what this project deliberately does not do.
- **Quality intent:** TODO: e.g. user-facing features require E2E coverage; correctness over
